fault_hypothesis: On line 74, `int()` truncates fractional shares toward zero instead of rounding, causing the sum of allocations to be less than `total` when weights don't divide evenly.

constraints.intent: After int-truncation, the sum of integer shares must equal the total; this is FALSE when truncation loses fractional points.
The raw float shares must sum exactly to total before integer conversion.

spec.expr: all(shares__1[i] >= (weights[i] / weight_sum__1) * total for i in range(len(shares__1)))

constraints.intent: Each share must be at least the proportional allocation, ensuring no lane is under-allocated before int truncation.
The returned allocations must sum to the total budget; failing tests violate this.
